name: Mister 9
short_description: Look for irregularities in the house where the uncles live. Irregulars are the enemy. For the sake of world peace, shoot without mercy.
detailed_description:
Men who are kind to you. However, irregularities sometimes occur to them. Shoot the men who cause irregularities with a gun without mercy. For the sake of world peace...

Three Articles For World Peace

1. The men are on my side. However, there are times when something irregular happens to them. When something irregular happens, shoot the man.

2. If nothing irregular happens, I am the irregular one. Shoot yourself to calm your mind.

3. The irregular is to shoot nine times in a row. If you are wrong, you start all over again...

Playing Time

About 1 to 2 Hours
(About 3 Hours If You Find All Irregularities)

About Video Distribution

・Distribution is available to both individuals and corporations without permission.
・Monetization is only possible when using the functions provided by the video distribution site.
・We would appreciate it if you include the name of the game in the title of your video or live broadcast, or include a link to the Steam page in the summary section.

We will not be liable for any damages caused by the distribution of videos of this game.
The contents of these guidelines are subject to change without notice.
